The race is nearing its climax, but our runners remain in a 
stalemate as they approach the third corner!

Will today's favorite Mejiro McQueen reach out to seize 
the glory of victory? Or will she be eclipsed by one of her 
many rivals?

I can sense how much you want to win this Tenno Sho, 
McQueen.
Which is why I'm going all out against you!

Mejiro Ryan picks up the pace! The gap between her and 
the leading McQueen is rapidly closing!

They hit the final corner with 600 meters to go! The rest of 
the rear pack are moving to catch up!
Is this the end of the line for Mejiro McQueen?
It certainly is not!

Allow me to show all of you the fruits of my trainer's and 
my efforts.
This victory is ours!
Wha?! She's so fast!
Mejiro McQueen breaks out into a spurt!
If it's an acceleration battle you're after…
You're on!

Ryan continues to close in from the inside! What a 
tremendous final spurt! But McQueen isn't losing steam!
I can't catch up… If anything…
The gap is growing!

McQueen is in the lead! Try as she may, Ryan can't catch 
up! Is this bout decided?
YAAAAH!

Mejiro McQueen keeps her lead! Mejiro McQueen is 
victorious!

Mejiro McQueen's done it! We've witnessed an absolutely 
stunning spring Tenno Sho triumph today!
